'''ham챦fv챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadgeek|roadgeek]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadgeek|roadgeek]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| ham챦fv챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦fth|ham챦fv챦fth]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦fj|ham챦fv챦fj]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦fsh|ham챦fv챦fsh]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f|ham챦fv챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:ham챦fm챦fv챦fth|ham챦fm챦fv챦fth]] || [[word:ham챦fm챦fv챦fj|ham챦fm챦fv챦fj]] || [[word:ham챦fm챦fv챦fsh|ham챦fm챦fv챦fsh]] || [[word:ham챦fm챦fv챦f|ham챦fm챦fv챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦fth|ham챦fv챦fth]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦fj|ham챦fv챦fj]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦fsh|ham챦fv챦fsh]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f|ham챦fv챦f]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f챦f챦f|ham챦fv챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f챦f챦f|ham챦fv챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f챦f챦f|ham챦fv챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f챦f챦f|ham챦fv챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f챦fn|ham챦fv챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f챦fn|ham챦fv챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f챦fn|ham챦fv챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ham챦fv챦f챦fn|ham챦fv챦f챦fn]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
